commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8d2866cf212251f8c6dead5a4579ab23d044ee44)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Nextcloud Talk webhook parsing and replay tests to split JSON parsing from schema validation and acknowledge signed valid-JSON non-Note events with 200/no dispatch.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +77. Total +109 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main and v2026.6.8 map signed schema misses to HTTP 400 before classifying valid non-message events. I did not run a live Nextcloud Talk server in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer action is needed to fix the classifier gap and supply production-path proof; automation cannot provide the contributor's real environment proof.

target.title: fix(nextcloud-talk): return 200 for non-message webhook events instead of 400
target.author: liuhao1024

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
